jira._notes: Workflow (updated 2026-07-07, second revision) is now STRICTLY LINEAR: Backlog -> (Selected for Development) -> In Progress -> In Review -> In Testing Staging -> Done, plus a Blocked side-status. IMPORTANT: transition IDs are edge-specific (per source status), NOT global for the pipeline stages, and the workflow is being actively edited, so IDs drift. Globals (work from any status): Backlog(11), Selected for Development(21), In Progress(31). Source-specific edges observed: inReview=2 (In Progress->In Review); testing=3 (In Review->In Testing Staging, status 11919); done=7 (In Testing Staging->Done, status 10056) -- NOTE done is NO LONGER 41 and is NOT reachable from In Progress or In Review; Done is only reachable from Testing. Block is source-specific: 6 (from In Progress), 5 (from In Review), 4 (from Testing), target status 11296. STRONG RECOMMENDATION: every role should resolve the transition ID dynamically via getTransitionsForJiraIssue and match the TARGET STATUS NAME (In Review / In Testing Staging / Done / Blocked) rather than trusting these stored IDs, and to reach Done must walk In Progress -> In Review -> Testing -> Done.
